title: Add dakera-go — Go SDK for Self-Hosted AI Agent Memory Server
author: ferhimedamine
body:
## dakera-go

**Repository:** https://github.com/dakera-ai/dakera-go
**Server Deploy:** https://github.com/dakera-ai/dakera-deploy

**Category suggestion:** Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning

**Description:** Go SDK for Dakera — a self-hosted AI agent memory server. Provides persistent, decay-weighted vector memory for AI agents with hybrid search (BM25 + vector ANN), knowledge graphs, and session management.

**Key features:**
- Store and recall agent memories with importance-weighted decay
- Hybrid search combining BM25 full-text and vector similarity
- Knowledge graph traversal and entity extraction
- Session management for agent lifecycle
- Batch operations for efficient bulk memory management

**Example usage:**

```go
import "github.com/dakera-ai/dakera-go"

client := dakera.NewClient("http://localhost:3300", "api-key")

// Store a memory
client.Store(ctx, dakera.StoreRequest{
    AgentID:    "my-agent",
    Content:    "User prefers dark mode",
    Importance: 0.8,
    Tags:       []string{"preference", "ui"},
})

// Recall memories
memories, _ := client.Recall(ctx, dakera.RecallRequest{
    AgentID: "my-agent",
    Query:   "user preferences",
    TopK:    5,
})
```

**Server:** Rust binary, single Docker container (`ghcr.io/dakera-ai/dakera:latest`)
**License:** MIT (SDK), Proprietary (server)

title: Base: ruby:4.0.1-alpine compiled from source 3 months ago
author: mehrshadshirazi66-wq
body:
Base: ruby:4.0.1-alpine compiled from source 3 months ago
CVEs: 1C + 11H + 7M + 2L (55 vulnerabilities in 18 packages)
Fix available: ruby:4.0.3-alpine — same OS, same size, removes 13 CVEs
COPA does not apply because Ruby is compiled from a tarball, not via APK

_Originally posted by @lmartinezl in https://github.com/docusealco/docuseal/issues/665_

CRITIC'S PICK

Marcus Thorne
